dialogue.intro.format: This Formal 1.0 demo uses stable presentation IDs and complete locale catalogs.
dialogue.intro.controls: Press H for history, hold Ctrl to skip, and press Esc for the system menu.
dialogue.mid.save_hint: This is a stable save point for save v5 and legacy-compatibility tests.
dialogue.finale.good: Thanks for playing the MoonSight Formal 1.0 demo.
dialogue.finale.alt: Thanks for trying the other door.
